name: Fried Banana
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the banana pieces in a shallow dish and coat evenly with flour.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the baking powder with 6 tablespoons of water to form a paste. Dip the banana pieces in this batter.
3. Heat the oil in a deep fryer or heavy-based pan to 170°C (340°F). Using a slotted spoon, carefully lower the coated banana pieces into the hot oil and fry for 4 minutes or until golden brown.
4. Remove the fried bananas with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
5. Drizzle each banana piece with honey before serving.
